articles.title: Robotic Dogs Join Hong Kong's Fight Against Mosquitoes
articles.summary: Hong Kong health authorities are stepping up efforts to control mosquitoes after breeding rates reached worrying levels across multiple districts, with Tai Wai recording the highest numbers. In a high-tech twist, robotic dogs are now being deployed to help inspect hard-to-reach areas where mosquitoes breed. Experts have also suggested that drones could be used in the future to target these insects more effectively. Mosquitoes can spread dangerous diseases, so controlling their numbers is important for public health. Officials are urging residents to remove any standing water near their homes, as even small amounts can become a breeding ground for mosquitoes.

lv1: Which district in Hong Kong had the most mosquitoes? (香港哪個地區的蚊子數量最多？)
What new technology is being used to help fight mosquitoes in Hong Kong? (香港用了什麼新科技來對付蚊子？)
lv2: Why is it important to control the mosquito population in a city like Hong Kong? (為什麼在香港這樣的城市控制蚊子數量很重要？)
How might robotic dogs be better than humans at finding mosquito breeding spots? (機械狗在找蚊子滋生地點方面，可能比人類有什麼優勝之處？)
lv3: Should the government spend money on expensive technology like robotic dogs and drones to fight mosquitoes, or would simpler community education campaigns be more effective? Give reasons for your view. (政府應該花錢購買機械狗和無人機等昂貴技術來對付蚊子，還是簡單的社區教育活動更有效？請說明你的看法。)

If climate change causes Hong Kong summers to become hotter and wetter, how might this affect the mosquito problem in the future, and what responsibilities do individuals and the government share in addressing it? (如果氣候變化令香港夏天變得更熱更潮濕，這將如何影響未來的蚊子問題？個人和政府在解決這個問題上各有什麼責任？)

articles.title: SpaceX Plans Massive Stock Market Listing That Could Be the World's Biggest Ever
articles.summary: SpaceX, the rocket and space exploration company founded by Elon Musk, has announced plans to launch what could become the largest initial public offering — known as an IPO — in stock market history. An IPO is when a private company sells shares to the public for the first time. This move could make Musk, already considered the world's wealthiest person, significantly richer. SpaceX is famous for building reusable rockets and supplying the International Space Station. Going public would allow ordinary investors around the world to own a small piece of the company that is helping shape the future of space travel.

lv1: What is the name of Elon Musk's space company that plans to list on the stock market? (伊隆·馬斯克計劃在股市上市的太空公司叫什麼名字？)
What does IPO stand for, and what does it mean? (IPO代表什麼意思？)
lv2: Why might a company like SpaceX choose to sell shares to the public instead of staying privately owned? (像SpaceX這樣的公司，為什麼可能選擇向公眾出售股份，而不是繼續保持私人擁有？)
How could SpaceX's growth affect the future of space exploration for ordinary people? (SpaceX的發展如何影響普通人未來的太空探索？)
lv3: Should private companies like SpaceX lead the future of space exploration, or should governments and public space agencies like NASA take the main role? Consider the benefits and drawbacks of each approach. (像SpaceX這樣的私人公司應該主導未來的太空探索，還是政府和像NASA這樣的公共太空機構應該擔當主要角色？請考慮每種方式的優缺點。)
If SpaceX becomes the most valuable company in the world, what impact might that have on global inequality, scientific progress, and the environment? (如果SpaceX成為全球最有價值的公司，這可能對全球不平等、科學進步和環境產生什麼影響？)

articles.title: 京東MALL灣仔新店開幕　計劃三年內在港開設多達八間分店
articles.summary: 中國電商巨頭京東在香港灣仔開設全新MALL門店，吸引不少市民關注。據報道，京東計劃在未來三年內在香港增設六至八間分店，目前已累計在香港投資逾350億元人民幣。京東MALL主打多元化購物體驗，結合網上及實體零售，讓顧客可以親身試用產品後再購買。此舉反映內地零售業積極開拓香港市場，亦顯示香港作為商業樞紐的吸引力持續。

lv1: 京東MALL在香港哪個地區開設新店？
京東計劃在未來三年在香港開設多少間分店？
lv2: 京東MALL結合網上及實體零售，對消費者有什麼好處？
為什麼內地大型零售商選擇在香港開設門店？香港對他們有什麼吸引力？
lv3: 內地零售商大舉進入香港市場，對香港本地中小型商戶有什麼影響？政府應否採取措施保護本地商戶？
網上購物愈來愈普及，實體零售店是否仍有存在的必要？請從消費者、商戶及社會三個角度分析。

articles.title: 內地電動車企業銷量下跌負債上升　業界面臨高研發成本壓力
articles.summary: 據最新報道，中國內地多家電動汽車製造商正面臨銷量下滑及負債增加的雙重壓力，令業界整體風險上升。分析人士指出，各車企為開發新技術投入龐大研發資金，令成本大幅增加。在市場競爭激烈的情況下，部分車企正加快「出海」步伐，嘗試進軍海外市場以尋求新出路。電動車行業的發展攸關全球減碳目標，但企業財務困難或影響整個行業的長遠前景。

lv1: 內地電動車企業目前面臨哪兩大主要困難？
lv2: 為什麼電動車企業需要投入大量研發資金？這對公司財務有什麼影響？
如果內地電動車企業出現財務困難，對全球推動電動車普及有什麼影響？
lv3: 政府應否向面臨財困的電動車企業提供補貼或援助？請分析支持和反對的理由，並考慮對納稅人、環境及市場競爭的影響。
電動車被視為解決氣候變化的重要方案之一，但若生產電動車的企業本身財務不穩，這是否動搖了電動車作為可持續發展工具的可信度？請表達你的看法。
